verses.text: 'The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice,' though clouds and darkness veil Him and fire goes before Him. His rule is both glad and awesome. The reign of God brings joy to the faithful and terror to His foes.

'The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice,' though clouds and darkness veil Him and fire goes before Him. His rule is both glad and awesome. The reign of God brings joy to the faithful and terror to His foes.

'The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice,' though clouds and darkness veil Him and fire goes before Him. His rule is both glad and awesome. The reign of God brings joy to the faithful and terror to His foes.
His lightnings light the world, the hills melt like wax before Him, and the heavens declare His righteousness. Creation trembles at His presence. The God of such majesty is utterly to be revered.
His lightnings light the world, the hills melt like wax before Him, and the heavens declare His righteousness. Creation trembles at His presence. The God of such majesty is utterly to be revered.
His lightnings light the world, the hills melt like wax before Him, and the heavens declare His righteousness. Creation trembles at His presence. The God of such majesty is utterly to be revered.
All who serve idols are put to shame, for He is exalted far above all gods and all the earth. False worship is confounded. The LORD alone is high above every rival, and idols cannot stand before Him.
All who serve idols are put to shame, for He is exalted far above all gods and all the earth. False worship is confounded. The LORD alone is high above every rival, and idols cannot stand before Him.
All who serve idols are put to shame, for He is exalted far above all gods and all the earth. False worship is confounded. The LORD alone is high above every rival, and idols cannot stand before Him.

'Ye that love the LORD, hate evil,' for He preserves His saints; 'light is sown for the righteous,' so let them rejoice and give thanks. Love for God breeds hatred of sin. A harvest of light and gladness awaits the upright.
